summary: Project with a login feature that is currently broken/failing.
known_issues: Member login is failing — reported by user after Version 50 deployment

existing_features.title: Fix the member login flow so that submitting a valid membership ID on the MemberLoginPage successfully authenticates the member, persists the login state to localStorage via useMemberAuth, and navigates to the MemberDashboard without error.

Audit and fix the backend getMemberByMembershipId (or equivalent) query/validation logic to ensure it correctly returns member data when queried with a valid membership ID, and that the frontend useMemberAuth hook properly handles the backend response (including any optional/null result variants).
